title: Did Psychedelics Play a Crucial Role in Religion?
summary: This interview explores the theory that early Christianity and other major religions may have originated as psychedelic experiences, with discussion of how institutional religion replaced direct mystical experiences with mediated religious authority.

key_claims.claim: Christianity, Judaism, and Islam all worship the same deity and prophets and are closely interlinked
Early Christianity was very much a psychedelic religion
Christ was originally seen more as a teacher than as the Son of God in early Christianity
The Roman Catholic Church oppressed early Christian sects that used psychedelics
